description:
Materials: Cotton
A personalized embroidered hat made for everyday wear, gifting, and special occasions. This custom baseball cap features your chosen text embroidered in your selected font and thread color, creating a unique and meaningful gift for men and women.

Perfect for birthdays, weddings, bachelorette trips, bridesmaid gifts, couple gifts, family matching, vacations, and casual daily outfits.

Why Buyers Love It:
• Custom text embroidery
• Vintage washed look
• Adjustable fit
• Easy to style with everyday outfits
• Great gift for him or her
• Multiple cap colors, thread colors, and font options
